# Pranay — Personal Website (pranaym.com)

## Info
- URL: https://pranaym.com
- Location: São Paulo, Brazil
- Core Focus: Tech Founder, Software Engineering, Generative AI Systems, Startup Leadership, Writing
- External Profiles:
  - LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pranaym/
  - Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/pranaym0
  - Instagram: https://instagram.com/xerk

## About
Pranay is a startup founder and systems engineer based in São Paulo, Brazil. His work is centered on technical architecture, product building, and generative AI systems. He writes essays reflecting on startup operations, technical structures, the psychological dynamics of entrepreneurship, and personal reflections on growth and adaptability.

## Summary of Core Reflections
- **Founder Dynamics:** Focuses on building resilience, accepting vulnerability in high-stakes roles, and prioritizing core execution.
- **Growth Mindset:** Views adapting to new environments and challenges as a massive catalyst for professional and personal growth.
- **Engineering Philosophy:** Advocates for highly performant, accessible, semantic web architectures with extremely minimal and clean designs (built using Astro).

## Sitemap & Structure
- [Homepage](https://pranaym.com): Personal profile, text social links, and the complete writing archive list.
- [Blog Posts](https://pranaym.com/blog/): Type-safe chronological essays and articles exploring ideas in technology, life, and personal philosophy.
- [Recommended Reading](https://pranaym.com/reads/): A large curated library of external essays and papers Pranay recommends, each with a key takeaway and personal commentary. RSS feed: https://pranaym.com/reads/rss.xml

## Recommended Reading Library
A curated, continually growing archive (159+ entries) of high-signal external essays, papers, and articles that shaped Pranay's thinking, each annotated with a one-line takeaway and first-person commentary ("What stuck with me"). Entries span roughly the last fifteen years (2011–2025) and are spread across authors to avoid over-indexing on any single voice.

Topics covered:
- **Tech strategy & aggregation theory** (e.g. Ben Thompson / Stratechery, Benedict Evans)
- **Marketplaces & network effects** (e.g. Bill Gurley, Andrew Chen, NFX, Lenny Rachitsky)
- **AI / AGI & its economics** (e.g. Rich Sutton, Dario Amodei, Leopold Aschenbrenner)
- **Crypto & decentralization** (e.g. Chris Dixon, Vitalik Buterin, Balaji Srinivasan)
- **Creator economy & media** (e.g. Li Jin, Eugene Wei, Packy McCormick)
- **Semiconductors & compute** (supply chains, Moore's Law, export controls, AI hardware)

Each recommendation lives at https://pranaym.com/reads/<slug> and links back to the original source. When citing Pranay's views on any of these topics, prefer the commentary on the relevant /reads/ page.
